ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's official website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock exchange was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (CIK) from the SEC */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date for the stock split */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the stock split */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Payable date for the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mergers_acquisitions" (
  "merger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merger or acquisition */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "merger_date" TEXT /* Date of the merger or acquisition */,
  "merger_type" TEXT /* Type of merger or acquisition (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "target_company" TEXT /* Name of the target company in the merger or acquisition */,
  "consideration" REAL /* Consideration paid in the merger or acquisition */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the merger or acquisition information (e.g., press release, SEC filing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mergers_acquisitions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the dividend */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Payable date for the dividend */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the analyst report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the analyst report */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst who wrote the report */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the analyst's firm */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target set by the analyst */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analyst report (e.g., report, press release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock performance metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., return on equity, debt to equity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance metric is calculated */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter for which the performance metric is calculated */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance metric is calculated (e.g., YTD, 1Y, 5Y) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the sector belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "industry_id")
)
